[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11100111 6
1 10111001 5
2 00000000 a
3 00100000 1
4 11101111 7
5 11111011 7
6 11101000 4
7 10110011 5
